customers:
Table: Customer profiles and contact information
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for customer, name (character varying) - Customer full name, phone (character varying) - Customer phone number, email (character varying) - Customer email address (unique), address (text) - Customer address for delivery/correspondence
discounts:
Table: Discount codes and promotional offers
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for discount, code (text) - Discount code (unique), description (text) - Description of the discount/promotion, type (text) - Discount type (percent for percentage, fixed for dollar amount), amount (numeric) - Discount amount (percentage value or dollar amount), start_date (date) - Start date when discount becomes valid, end_date (date) - End date when discount expires
employee:
Table: Staff members working at restaurant locations
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for employee, name (character varying) - Full name of employee, role_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing roles table, location_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing location where employee works, email (character varying) - Email address (unique per employee), hire_date (date) - Date employee was hired. Foreign keys: role_id references roles.id, location_id references location.id
ingredients:
Table: Individual ingredients/raw materials used in recipes
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for ingredient, name (text) - Name of ingredient (flour, chicken, tomato, etc.), unit (character varying) - Unit of measurement (kg, liter, pieces, cups, grams)
inventory:
Table: Current stock levels of ingredients at each location
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for inventory record, location_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing location, ingredient_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing ingredients, quantity_on_hand (numeric) - Current stock quantity available, reorder_threshold (numeric) - Minimum quantity before reordering is triggered. Foreign keys: location_id references location.id, ingredient_id references ingredients.id
location:
Table: Stores information about restaurant branches/locations
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for location, name (text) - Name of the restaurant location/branch, address (text) - Physical address of the location, timezone (text) - Timezone for the location (used for order timing)
loyalty_accounts:
Table: Customer loyalty/rewards program accounts
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for loyalty account, customer_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing customers, points_balance (integer) - Current loyalty points balance. Foreign keys: customer_id references customers.id
loyalty_txn:
Table: Transaction history for loyalty points (earned/redeemed)
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for loyalty transaction, loyalty_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing loyalty_accounts, points_change (integer) - Number of points earned (positive) or redeemed (negative), txn_type (text) - Transaction type (earn or redeem), txn_time (timestamp without time zone) - Timestamp when transaction occurred. Foreign keys: loyalty_id references loyalty_accounts.id
menu_categories:
Table: Menu categories (Appetizers, Entrees, Desserts, Beverages, etc.)
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for category, name (text) - Category name (must be unique)
menu_items:
Table: Menu items/dishes available for ordering
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for menu item, category_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing menu_categories, name (character varying) - Name of the dish, description (text) - Description of the dish (ingredients, preparation notes), base_price (numeric) - Base price of the menu item, is_active (boolean) - Whether item is currently available (active/inactive). Foreign keys: category_id references menu_categories.id
order_discounts:
Table: Links discounts applied to specific orders
Columns: order_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing orders, discount_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing discounts. Foreign keys: order_id references orders.id, discount_id references discounts.id
order_items:
Table: Individual menu items that make up an order
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for order item, order_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing orders, menu_item_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing menu_items, quantity (integer) - Quantity of this menu item ordered, unit_price (numeric) - Price per unit at time of order. Foreign keys: order_id references orders.id, menu_item_id references menu_items.id
orders:
Table: Customer orders placed at restaurant
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for order, location_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing location where order was placed, customer_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing customer (NULL for walk-ins), employee_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing employee who took the order, table_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing table where customer is seated, order_time (timestamp without time zone) - Timestamp when order was placed, total_amount (numeric) - Total order amount (before tax and tip), tax_amount (numeric) - Tax amount for order, tip_amount (numeric) - Tip amount for order, status (text) - Order status (open, completed, cancelled). Foreign keys: location_id references location.id, customer_id references customers.id, employee_id references employee.id, table_id references tables.id
payments:
Table: Payment records for orders
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for payment, order_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing orders (one payment per order), payment_time (timestamp without time zone) - Timestamp when payment was processed, amount (numeric) - Payment amount (total + tax + tip), method (text) - Payment method (cash, credit_card, debit_card, etc.), status (text) - Payment status (paid, pending, failed, refunded). Foreign keys: order_id references orders.id
recipe_items:
Table: Defines recipes by listing ingredients needed for each menu item
Columns: menu_item_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing menu_items, ingredient_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing ingredients, qty_per_recipe (numeric) - Quantity of ingredient needed per recipe (in ingredient unit). Foreign keys: menu_item_id references menu_items.id, ingredient_id references ingredients.id
reservations:
Table: Table reservations/bookings by customers
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for reservation, table_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing tables, customer_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing customers, start_time (timestamp without time zone) - Reservation start time, end_time (timestamp without time zone) - Reservation end time, status (text) - Reservation status (booked, checked_in, no_show, cancelled). Foreign keys: table_id references tables.id, customer_id references customers.id
roles:
Table: Employee roles/job titles (Chef, Waiter, Manager, etc.)
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for role, role_name (character varying) - Name of the job role (must be unique)
shifts:
Table: Employee work shifts/schedules
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for shift, employee_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing employee, location_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing location, shift_start (timestamp without time zone) - Start time of work shift, shift_end (timestamp without time zone) - End time of work shift. Foreign keys: employee_id references employee.id, location_id references location.id
supplier:
Table: Ingredient suppliers/vendors
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for supplier, name (text) - Supplier company name
supplier_items:
Table: Pricing of ingredients from different suppliers
Columns: supplier_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing supplier, ingredient_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing ingredients, unit_cost (numeric) - Cost per unit of ingredient from this supplier. Foreign keys: supplier_id references supplier.id, ingredient_id references ingredients.id
tables:
Table: Physical dining tables at restaurant locations
Columns: id (integer) - Unique identifier for table, table_catalog (name) - None, table_schema (name) - None, location_id (integer) - Foreign key referencing location, table_number (integer) - Table number within location, table_name (name) - None, capacity (integer) - Number of people the table can seat, table_type (character varying) - None, self_referencing_column_name (name) - None, reference_generation (character varying) - None, user_defined_type_catalog (name) - None, user_defined_type_schema (name) - None, user_defined_type_name (name) - None, is_insertable_into (character varying) - None, is_typed (character varying) - None, commit_action (character varying) - None. Foreign keys: location_id references location.id
